title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Kolte-Patil Developers Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Kolte-Patil Developers Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Kolte-Patil Developers Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Sales Manager based out of Dhanbad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Kolte-Patil Developers Asia Pacific Associates:
Kolte-Patil Developers Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kolte-Patil Developers Asia Pacific Associates!
